title: Pocket Arbiter Training Data
subtitle: SimCSE+ICT pairs for EmbeddingGemma-300M self-supervised fine-tuning
description: Training data for Pocket Arbiter chess arbiter RAG app. Contains SimCSE dropout-augmentation pairs (1116) and ICT pseudo-query pairs (1067) extracted from FFE regulation corpus. Used with sentence-transformers LoRA fine-tuning on EmbeddingGemma-300M. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-20-simcse-ict-finetuning-design.md
